Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Software Engineer at Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: 200123456G). Your employment with us will commence on 1 November 2023, with a starting annual salary of SGD 85,000.

Please note that this offer is contingent upon the successful completion of a background check and verification of your credentials. Your employment terms will be subject to the company's standard policies and procedures.

While we are excited about your potential contributions, we want to emphasize that our current project plan should not be misconstrued as a final project status. Your input will be valuable in shaping our ongoing efforts.

For the purposes of this offer, "SPA" refers to the Senior Position Agreement, which outlines the specific terms of your role and responsibilities. Please review the SPA carefully before signing.

Should you accept this offer, kindly sign below and return a copy by 25 October 2023. We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Yours sincerely,

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Human Resources Manager  
Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd  
+65 9876 5432  
siti.aishah@example.sg  

---

I, Dr. Tan Wei Ming, accept the offer as outlined above and agree to the terms set forth in the SPA.
